PreToolUse.description: Deny every tool call while state/pause.json is set, except a channel reply tool and PushNotification
Enforce deny-patterns (always_on incl. OPERATOR.md only when AGENT_HOOK_PROFILE=strict), warn on template edits
Warn (or block, with HERMIT_CACHE_GUARD=block) when editing a marketplace cache copy whose runtime source is canonical
Deny AskUserQuestion on always-on channel-primary sessions with a redirect to the channel reply tool + micro-proposal bridge (binds the callers the static contract test cannot see)

PermissionDenied.description: Notify the channel (deterministic send, deduped) when the auto-mode classifier denies a tool call on the managed unattended session — denials stop being silent

PostToolUse.description: Persist dm_channel_id to config.json after channel reply

hooks.command: bash -c '[ -z "${HERMIT_DEV_MODE:-}" ] && exit 0; INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qF "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "scripts/|hooks/"; then bun test "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/tests" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Run contract tests after script/hook edits (dev mode only: set HERMIT_DEV_MODE=1). Stays in shell form: uses stdin/jq/pipes; convert by porting to Node, not by switching to args:[].
Regenerate state-summary.md after state/ file edits
Append skill invocations and compiled/ reads to state/usage-metrics.jsonl (weekly-review consumes it for untouched-knowledge suggestions)

UserPromptSubmit.description: Inject current local time before every prompt so the model never anchors to a stale 'now'
Inject reply-tool reminder when inbound prompt starts with a <channel source=...> envelope
Record last operator-action timestamp; skips routine/loop/channel prompts
Deterministic pause/resume/snooze keyword writer — writes state/pause.json before any model turn, gated by the channel's allowed_users
Deterministic status responder — send-then-block reply to an exact idle 'status' message, gated by the channel's allowed_users; never fires on a near-miss or mid-turn arrival

SessionStart.description: Reset last-operator-action clock on session start

Stop.description: Stop pipeline: cost tracking, compact suggestion, session diff, evaluation, heartbeat

SubagentStop.description: Capture async-dispatched subagent token cost (invisible to Stop-time cost-tracker)

PreCompact.description: Stamp SHELL.md Progress Log before context compaction (manual /compact or native auto-compaction) — a breadcrumb only, never blocks compaction. Does not fire on /clear; the watchdog's own emergency /clear flushes separately in hermit-watchdog.ts
